summary: Exploratory QA covered the Slice 31 recipe media/tag flows across YouTube import, manual recipe creation, and recipe detail. Fixture-backed browser evidence plus Vitest/product/build/smoke/a11y/mobile visual checks show thumbnail preview, read-only tags, manual image upload states, cleanup behavior, source note display, and narrow mobile text fit with no unresolved blocker or major finding.
remainingRisks: Real YouTube provider + real Supabase Auth/DB/Storage end-to-end smoke remains Manual Only and is documented in docs/workpacks/31-recipe-media-tags/acceptance.md.
Manual upload screenshot uses a fixture image to prove preview geometry and controls; real food photography quality remains outside automated evidence.
Local pnpm test:e2e:visual:web-core still fails on an existing Darwin HOME snapshot drift outside Slice 31 changed routes.
checks: pnpm exec vitest run tests/manual-recipe-create-screen.test.tsx tests/menu-add-screen.test.tsx tests/recipio-youtube-import.test.ts tests/recipe-detail-screen.test.tsx

checklistCoverage.notes: Vitest covers extract/register contract, server-owned thumbnail/tags, no client override, and no thumbnail rehost. Playwright fixture shows preview UI and detail display.
